---
title: "otolith paper plots"
author: "Sarah Willington"
date: "2026-04-01"
output: html_document
---


code for site map, temperature and data summary plots

```{r libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(cowplot)
library(patchwork)
```


```{r load data}
project_dir <- here::here()
hadisst_summer <- read_csv(file.path(project_dir, "0_data", "02_cleaned_data", "hadisst_summer.csv"))
d <- read_csv(file.path(project_dir, "0_data", "02_cleaned_data", "otolith_analysis.csv"))
boxes_raw <- read_csv(file.path(project_dir, "0_data", "01_raw_data", "oto_sites_HadISST_map.csv"))
boxes_raw <- boxes_raw |> 
  mutate(site = factor(site, ordered = TRUE, 
                       levels = c("NSI", "SYD", "NAR", "VIC", "FI", "NEC", "EC", "SEC", "HCR" )))

```

### temperature plot

```{r basic temp plot for paper}
# hcl_palettes(plot = TRUE)
# pal <- sequential_hcl(palette = "red-blue", n=9)
# pal <- diverge_hcl(palette = "blue-red 3", n=9)
# pal <- qualitative_hcl(palette = "dark 2", n=9)


cbPalette <- c("#D55E00","#CC79A7", "#E69F00","#EED202", "#000000", "#56B4E9", "#009E73", "#0072B2",   "grey30") 
colorspace::swatchplot(cbPalette, cvd = TRUE)


hadisst_summer_plot <- hadisst_summer |>  
  filter(site!="TAS"& site!="pb" & site!="ehn" ) |> 
   mutate(site = case_when(
                          site == "sydney" ~ "SYD", 
                          site == "narooma" ~ "NAR",
                          site == "hcr" ~ "HCR",
                          TRUE ~ site)) |> 
 mutate(year = as.numeric(year), 
         site = factor(site, ordered = TRUE, 
                       levels = c("NSI", "SYD", "NAR", "VIC", "FI", "NEC", "EC", "SEC", "HCR" ))) |> 
  filter(year>1923)

summer_pl <- ggplot(hadisst_summer_plot, aes(year, sst_summer, group = site, colour = site))+
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.3)+
   scale_color_manual(values = cbPalette)+
  labs(x = "Year", y = expression("Mean summer SST ( " * degree * "C)"), colour = "Site")+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(n = 6))+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(n = 6))+
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(linewidth = 1.2)))+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),  
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_text(size =9 ),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8), 
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 9), 
    axis.title.x = element_blank())
summer_pl

summer_pl+
  theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 5, b = 5, l = 5))

# ggsave(
#   "03_graphics/sst_base.png",
#   summer_pl,
#   width = 10,
#   height = 9,
#   dpi = 600,
#   units = "cm"
# )


```


### data summery plot 

```{r data summary plot}
# 0) enforce site order

site_levels <- c("NSI","SYD","NAR","VIC","FI","NEC","EC","SEC","HCR")
d2 <- d %>% mutate(site = case_when(
  site == "sydney" ~ "SYD", 
  site == "narooma" ~ "NAR",
  site == "hcr" ~ "HCR",
  TRUE ~ site)) |>
  mutate(site = factor(site, levels = site_levels))

fish_order <- d2 %>%
  group_by(FishID) %>%
  summarise(
    site = first(site),
    first_year = min(fishyear, na.rm = TRUE),
    last_year  = max(fishyear, na.rm = TRUE),
    oldest_age = max(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(site), first_year, FishID) %>%
  mutate(y = row_number())

d_plot <- d2 %>%
  left_join(fish_order %>% select(FishID, y), by = "FishID")

site_labs <- fish_order %>%
  group_by(site) %>%
  summarise(
    y_mid = mean(y),
    x_lab = min(first_year) + 1,
    .groups = "drop"
  )%>%
  mutate(
    x_lab = if_else(site == "HCR", x_lab - 3, x_lab)) |> 
  mutate(
    x_lab = if_else(site == "VIC", x_lab - 2, x_lab)) |> 
  mutate(
    x_lab = if_else(site == "SEC", x_lab + 8, x_lab)) |> 
  mutate(
    x_lab = if_else(site == "FI", x_lab - 2, x_lab)) |> 
  mutate(
    x_lab = if_else(site == "NAR", x_lab - 3, x_lab)) |> 
  mutate(
      y_lab = if_else(site == "HCR", y_mid - 30, y_mid)  
    )



cbPalette <- c("#D55E00","#CC79A7", "#E69F00","#EED202", "#000000", "#56B4E9", "#009E73", "#0072B2",   "grey30") 

site_cols <- setNames(cbPalette, site_levels) 
site_scale <- scale_colour_manual(
  values = site_cols,
  breaks = site_levels,
  drop = FALSE,
  name = "Site"
)

p <- ggplot(d_plot, aes(x = fishyear, y = y, group = FishID, colour = site)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_text(
    data = site_labs,
    aes(x = x_lab, y = y_mid, label = site, colour = site),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 2.5,
    hjust = 1, nudge_y = -5, fontface = "bold") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values = site_cols, breaks = site_levels, drop = FALSE) +
  site_scale+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(n = 6))+
  labs(x = "Year", y = "N individuals") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),  
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none", 
        axis.title = element_text(size =9 ),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8))
p

# ggsave(
#   "03_graphics/oto_data_summary.png",
#   p,
#   width = 8,
#   height = 8,
#   dpi = 600,
#   units = "cm"
# )

```

### site map plot

```{r}
# 2) Convert each row into an sf polygon (rectangle) + label point (centroid)
boxes_sf <- boxes_raw |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(
    geom = st_as_sfc(
      st_bbox(
        c(xmin = lonmin, ymin = latmin, xmax = lonmax, ymax = latmax),
        crs = st_crs(4326)   # lon/lat WGS84
      )
    )
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  st_as_sf() |>
  st_set_crs(4326)


# 3) Base map: Australia outline (Natural Earth)

aus <- rnaturalearth::ne_download(
  scale = 10,
  type = "land",
  category = "physical",
  returnclass = "sf"
) |>
  st_transform(4326)

# Crop to Australia region (keeps TAS + nearby islands)
aus <- st_crop(aus, xmin = 110, xmax = 160, ymin = -46, ymax = -8)

# Coastline as boundary of land polygons
coastline <- st_boundary(aus) |> st_cast("MULTILINESTRING")

# Projected CRS for distance ops
crs_m <- 3577

boxes_m   <- st_transform(boxes_sf, crs_m)
coast_m   <- st_transform(coastline, crs_m) |> st_make_valid()
centres_m <- st_centroid(boxes_m)

anchors_m <- purrr::map2(
  st_geometry(boxes_m),
  st_geometry(centres_m),
  \(box_geom, centre_geom) {
    
    box_sfc    <- st_sfc(box_geom, crs = crs_m)
    centre_sfc <- st_sfc(centre_geom, crs = crs_m)
    
    seg <- suppressWarnings(st_intersection(coast_m, box_sfc))
    
    if (length(seg) == 0 || all(st_is_empty(seg))) {
      return(centre_geom) 
    }
    
    seg_u <- st_union(seg)
    
    np  <- st_nearest_points(centre_sfc, seg_u)   
    pts <- st_cast(np, "POINT")                  
    
    pts[[2]]  # <-- return sfg (2nd point = on coastline)
  }
) |>
  st_sfc(crs = crs_m) |>
  st_as_sf() |>
  mutate(site = boxes_sf$site)

anchors_sf <- st_transform(anchors_m, 4326)
# --- labels: nudged offshore (east + south) from the anchor ---
# (tweak dx/dy to move labels further over ocean)
dx <- 0.15
dy <- 0.15

anchors_xy <- st_coordinates(anchors_sf) |> as_tibble() |> rename(lon = X, lat = Y)

labels_df <- tibble(
  site = anchors_sf$site,
  lon  = anchors_xy$lon + dx,
  lat  = anchors_xy$lat - dy
)

# --- override NEC + HCR anchor locations  ---

anchors_xy <- st_coordinates(anchors_sf) |>
  as_tibble() |>
  rename(lon = X, lat = Y) |>
  mutate(site = anchors_sf$site)

# Nudge rules:
# NEC: push east so it sits on the NE coast
# HCR: move south (and slightly east) so it's off south Bruny
anchors_xy <- anchors_xy |>
  mutate(
    lon = case_when(
      site == "NEC" ~ lon + 0.35,   # <-- adjust this if needed
      site == "HCR" ~ lon + 0.09,   # <-- optional tiny east tweak
      TRUE ~ lon
    ),
    lat = case_when(
      site == "HCR" ~ lat - 0.4,   # <-- adjust this if needed
      TRUE ~ lat
    )
  )

# Rebuild anchors_sf
anchors_sf <- st_as_sf(anchors_xy, coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326)


# Rebuild labels from (updated) anchors
dx <- 0.15
dy <- 0.15

labels_df <- anchors_xy |>
  transmute(site, lon = lon + dx, lat = lat - dy)

# move just FI label (tweak values)
labels_df <- labels_df |>
  mutate(
    lon = if_else(site == "FI", lon - 1.15, lon),  # move east (+) / west (-)
    lat = if_else(site == "FI", lat + 0.25, lat),    # move north (+) / south (-)
    
    # HCR: move west (lon -) and south (lat -)
    lon = if_else(site == "HCR", lon - 0.30, lon),
    lat = if_else(site == "HCR", lat - 0.15, lat)
  )

# then rebuild labels_sf (as you already do)
labels_sf <- st_as_sf(labels_df, coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326)


# 4) SE-Aus extent from your boxes (+ padding)
pad <- 1.5
xlim <- range(c(boxes_raw$lonmin, boxes_raw$lonmax)) + c(-pad, pad)
ylim <- range(c(boxes_raw$latmin, boxes_raw$latmax)) + c(-pad, pad)

# Make an sf rectangle showing the SE-Aus zoom extent (for inset highlight)
zoom_bbox_sf <- st_as_sfc(st_bbox(c(xmin = xlim[1], ymin = ylim[1], xmax = xlim[2], ymax = ylim[2]),
                                  crs = st_crs(4326))) |>
  st_sf(geometry = _)

site_levels <- c("NSI","SYD","NAR","VIC","FI","NEC","EC","SEC","HCR")

# force simple factor (NOT ordered) for anything used in aes(colour = site)
anchors_sf <- anchors_sf |> mutate(site = factor(as.character(site), levels = site_levels))
labels_sf  <- labels_sf  |> mutate(site = factor(as.character(site), levels = site_levels))


cbPalette <- c("#D55E00","#CC79A7", "#E69F00","#EED202", "#000000",
               "#56B4E9", "#009E73", "#0072B2", "grey30")

site_cols <- setNames(cbPalette, site_levels)  # MUST be a named vector

# 5) Main (zoomed) plot
p_main <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = aus, linewidth = 0.2, fill = "grey85") +
  # anchor dots
  geom_sf(data = anchors_sf, aes(colour=site), size = 1.7) +
  # labels
  geom_sf_text(
    data = labels_sf, aes(label = site, colour = site),
    size = 2.9, fontface = "bold", hjust = -0.35, vjust = 1
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = site_cols, breaks = site_levels, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(n = 2))+
  coord_sf(xlim = xlim, ylim = ylim, expand = FALSE) +
  labs(x = expression("Longitude ("*degree*"E)"), 
       y =  expression("Latitude ("*degree*"S)")) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2), 
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.title = element_text(size = 9), 
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8))

# main no colour
p_main_bw <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = aus, linewidth = 0.2, fill = "grey85") +
  # anchor dots
  geom_sf(data = anchors_sf, size = 1.7) +
  # labels
  geom_sf_text(
    data = labels_sf, aes(label = site),
    size = 2.9, fontface = "bold", hjust = -0.35, vjust = 1
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(n = 2))+
  coord_sf(xlim = xlim, ylim = ylim, expand = FALSE) +
  labs(x = expression("Longitude ("*degree*"E)"), 
       y =  expression("Latitude ("*degree*"S)")) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2), 
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.title = element_text(size = 9), 
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        plot.background  = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA))

# 6) Inset (whole Australia) plot with zoom box highlighted
p_inset <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = aus, fill = "grey85", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_sf(data = zoom_bbox_sf, fill = NA, linewidth = 0.3, colour = "black") +
  coord_sf(expand = FALSE) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.4)
  )



p <- p +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 5, b = 5, l = 5))
summer_pl <- summer_pl +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 5, b = 5, l = 5))

right_plots <- (summer_pl / p) + plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1))

map_plot <- p_main +
  inset_element(
    p_inset,
    left = 0.02,
    bottom = 0.6,
    right = 0.55,
    top = 0.99,
    align_to = "full"
  ) +theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 0, b = 5, l = 5))


final_plot <- (map_plot | right_plots) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1)) 


final_plot

# ggsave(
#   filename = "site_map_temp.png",
#   plot = final_plot,
#   dpi = 600,
#   path = "03_graphics/01_maps/",
#   width = 16,
#   height = 14,
#   units = "cm",
#   bg = "white"
# )

# ggsave(filename = "site_map_nobg.png",
#        plot = p_main_bw,
#        dpi = 600,
#        device = ragg::agg_png,
#        path = "03_graphics/01_maps/",
#        width = 9.5,
#        height = 11,
#        units = "cm",
#        bg = "transparent"
#        )



```
